summary: Google Calendar Integration and Visual Email Template Editor features tested. Backend: 13/13 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features verified working correctly - Settings page shows Google Calendar section with OAuth config, Email Editor loads with drag & drop blocks (Texto, Imagen, Botón, Divisor, Columnas), templates can be saved to database.
passed_tests: Backend: Authentication with demo credentials (carlos.mendoza@leadvibes.mx)
Backend: GET /api/settings/integrations - returns google_client_id, google_client_secret, google_calendar_enabled, google_calendar_email fields
Backend: PUT /api/settings/integrations - accepts google_client_id and google_client_secret
Backend: GET /api/oauth/google/login - returns authorization_url when credentials configured
Backend: POST /api/oauth/google/disconnect - successfully disconnects Google Calendar
Backend: GET /api/email-templates - returns list of templates
Backend: POST /api/email-templates - creates template with json_content for visual editor
Backend: GET /api/email-templates/{id} - returns template with json_content
Backend: PUT /api/email-templates/{id} - updates template
Backend: DELETE /api/email-templates/{id} - removes template (verified with 404 on GET)
Backend: GET /api/email-templates/{id} non-existent returns 404
Backend: PUT /api/email-templates/{id} non-existent returns 404
Frontend: Login with demo credentials works
Frontend: Settings page loads with data-testid='settings-page'
Frontend: Integraciones tab accessible
Frontend: Google Calendar section visible with 'Sincroniza tu calendario' description
Frontend: Client ID input visible with placeholder for .apps.googleusercontent.com
Frontend: Client Secret input visible with placeholder for GOCSPX-xxx
Frontend: 'Conectar con Google' button visible (disabled until credentials entered)
Frontend: 'No conectado' badge shows when not connected
Frontend: Campaigns page loads with Emails tab
Frontend: 'Crear Plantilla' button visible in Emails tab (data-testid='create-template-btn')
Frontend: Email Editor page loads at /email-templates/new
Frontend: Block sidebar shows all 5 block types (Texto, Imagen, Botón, Divisor, Columnas)
Frontend: Can add text block to canvas
Frontend: Can add button block to canvas
Frontend: Can add divider block to canvas
Frontend: Block settings panel updates when selecting a block (shows Divisor config)
Frontend: Template name input (data-testid='template-name-input') works
Frontend: Subject input (data-testid='template-subject-input') works
Frontend: Save button creates template - 'Plantilla guardada' toast shown
Frontend: URL updates to /email-templates/{id} after save
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_google_calendar_email_templates.py - Created comprehensive tests for Google Calendar and Email Templates APIs
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed email templates during testing (cleaned up by pytest fixture)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Google Calendar Integration and Visual Email Template Editor features are fully functional. Backend: All CRUD endpoints for email templates work including json_content support for visual editor. Google OAuth endpoints work but require real Google credentials to complete full flow. Frontend: Settings page has Google Calendar section in Integraciones tab with Client ID/Secret inputs. Email Editor at /email-templates/new has block sidebar (Texto, Imagen, Botón, Divisor, Columnas), canvas for drag & drop editing, and block settings panel. Templates are saved via POST/PUT to /api/email-templates with both html_content and json_content. Spanish UI throughout.

google_calendar_integration.settings_section: Google Calendar card in Integraciones tab with Client ID, Client Secret inputs and connect button
google_calendar_integration.status_badge: Shows 'No conectado' or 'Conectado' based on google_calendar_enabled field

visual_email_editor.block_types: Texto, Imagen, Botón, Divisor, Columnas - all with data-testid attributes
visual_email_editor.settings_panel: Right sidebar shows block-specific settings (color, font size, padding, etc.)
visual_email_editor.save_functionality: POST creates new template, PUT updates existing
visual_email_editor.json_content: Visual editor state stored in json_content field alongside generated html_content

campaigns_page.emails_tab: Shows email history and 'Crear Plantilla' button
